title: Nuremberg Trains [MTR 3/4]
description: This is a resourcepack for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod. It adds the Nuremberg Subway G1 to Minecraft
body:
This is an resourepack for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod. It adds trains from Nuremberg.
Currently there are the G1 and DT1 Subway.

Check out [Juli303](https://modrinth.com/user/juli303) for the [MTR 3 Version of the DT1-Model](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-mvv-addon)!
